mano_cua.result_summary: EyeDropper工具可以正常取色(#DE923E)，但右侧面板存在严重布局bug：颜色面板定位在浏览器视口外（仅~20px可见），100%缩放下用户无法看到完整的颜色选择器/调色板面板。'||'展开按钮仅hover可见，可发现性差。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: EyeDropper tool functionally picks up color (#DE923E). Color picker panel shows correct hex value. However, right sidebar panel is positioned partially outside browser viewport - primary/secondary color swatches are mostly off-screen. Panel expand button ('||') only appears on hover. Critical layout/visual bug making right sidebar essentially inaccessible at 100% zoom.
